news.title: Apple at 50: The iPhone maker 'blew a 5-year lead' on AI, but former insiders say it can still win
news.summary: To compete in AI, Apple may have to pivot. In dominating consumer devices, Apple sold users on the promise of privacy. To compete inAI, Apple must pivot.

news.title: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course
news.summary: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it. Warsh is a former head of the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers. He was nominated by President Barack Obama.

news.title: Buffett may end donations to Gates charity over Bill's ties to Epstein
news.summary: Revelations about Jeffrey Epstein's ties to Bill Gates have strained his friendship with Warren Buffett and the Omaha billionaire's annual multi-billion-dollar donations to the Gates Foundation.

news.title: U.S. payrolls rose by 178,000 in March, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
news.summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 59,000 in March. The unemployment rate was expected to hold at 4.4%. The economy is expected to grow by 0.3% in the first quarter.

news.title: U.S. fighter jet shot down in Iran, one crew member rescued, MS NOW reports
news.summary: The U.S. is searching for the second member of the F-15 aircraft's crew, whose whereabouts are unknown, MS NOW reported.

news.title: ‘I feel overwhelmed’: I’m 56 and only have $60,000 in my IRA. Is it too late for me?
news.summary: “My husband has a pension, but I worry that if he passes before me, I could be left with nothing,” she says.

news.title: These charts show the cracks in the stock market are widening
news.summary: S&P 500 technical indicators point to further weakening. S&P 500 Technical indicators point towards further weakening in the U.S.

news.title: Is it unethical to use AI in my Airbnb photos to market my property to guests?
news.summary: “No matter what I do, the beds still look a bit creased and worn, even grubby, in pictures.”

news.title: Some central banks have been selling their gold. That doesn’t mean you should too.
news.summary: Gold suffered its biggest monthly drop in nearly 13 years and some central banks have shifted from being buyers to sellers. But that actually proves the precious metal can be more valuable to investors than it's ever been.

news.title: ‘This is an overlooked catastrophe’: Why do so many hospitals not accept Medicare Advantage for cancer patients?
news.summary: Insurers have pushed certain cancer-care centers out of network before the end of the calendar or policy year, the company says. “Insurers are pushing certain cancer care centers.” the company adds.
